sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 11.8g of fat. cholesterol adds to the tradeoff. for meats, fat quality matters a lot once the protein is already there.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 26.1g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. strong protein is expected here, so the rest of the profile decides how high it climbs.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin b12 at 100% daily value stands out most. that is major vitamin support.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin b12 at 100% daily value stands out most. that is major vitamin support.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: zinc at 39% daily value, iron at 15% daily value stand out most. useful, but still not a major mineral edge.
sections.subtitleText: zinc at 39% daily value, iron at 15% daily value stand out most. useful, but still not a major mineral edge.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first: can control hunger well in real meals. that is a major reason the category stays relevant. easy to centre a meal around. practical meal value matters. high satiety protein source. that is a major real-world strength for meat.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: sourcing quality can change the real-world result a lot. not every version of the same meat is equal. fat quality can go sideways fast. some meats are strong until the fat profile shows up. quality swings a lot by cut and processing. the category can look very different depending on what version you actually buy.

closing.summary: Lean Beef has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when you want efficient protein and can accept the category tradeoffs that come with it.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want efficient protein and can accept the category tradeoffs that come with it.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

explanation.summary: Vitamins are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in A tier.
